text.title: Hook Bank Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals — post volume, baseline availability, pattern count — to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the operator post ≥3× per week AND have ≥30 posts with impression data?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — sample too small; use a generic swipe file first
BLOCK — exclude rows missing any of 6 fields
BLOCK — demote weakest pattern to bring count ≤15

branch.when: reviewed_at OLDER THAN 14 days AND rows changed

conclusion.verdict: APPROVE — bank ready for remix loop

text.example: Operator posts 5×/week, 47 posts in history, platform_medians computed, all rows have 6 fields, 6 active patterns, reviewed_at today, no flop_streak ≥3 → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
